title: phyllanthus chrysanthus var. chrysanthus
intro: Phyllanthus chrysanthus var. chrysanthus, also known as the yellow fruit tree or yellow leaf, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthraquinone glycosides and flavonoids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and supporting immune system function. In traditional herbal medicine, Phyllanthus chrysanthus var. chrysanthus is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or dried extract, and is used to treat a range of conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
